metadata.description: USACO topics with prerequisite ordering, colored by level

nodes.label: I/O & Time Complexity
nodes.description: Fast I/O, reading/writing files, understanding O(n) notation and time limits

nodes.label: Simulation
nodes.description: Simulating processes step by step as described in the problem

nodes.label: Complete Search
nodes.description: Brute force enumeration, exhaustive search, iterating over all subsets and permutations

nodes.label: Recursion
nodes.description: Recursive thinking, recursive enumeration, generating subsets and permutations

nodes.label: Ad Hoc
nodes.description: Problems requiring creative, problem-specific approaches without standard algorithms

nodes.label: Rectangle Geometry
nodes.description: Axis-aligned rectangle intersection, union area, and containment problems

nodes.label: Sorting
nodes.description: Built-in sort, custom comparators, sorting by multiple keys

nodes.label: Sets & Maps
nodes.description: Using sets for uniqueness, maps for key-value lookup, frequency counting

nodes.label: Introduction to Graphs
nodes.description: Graph terminology, adjacency list/matrix representation, basic traversal concepts

nodes.label: Introduction to Greedy
nodes.description: Greedy approach basics, coin change intuition, simple greedy proofs

nodes.label: Basic Number Theory
nodes.description: Divisibility, primes, GCD/LCM, modular arithmetic basics

nodes.label: Basic String Processing
nodes.description: String manipulation, substring operations, character frequency counting

nodes.label: Arrays & Stacks/Queues
nodes.description: Arrays, stacks, queues, deques as fundamental data structures

nodes.label: 2D Array / Grid Problems
nodes.description: Traversing and manipulating 2D grids, directional movement, boundary handling

nodes.label: Binary Search
nodes.description: Binary search on sorted arrays and binary search on the answer

nodes.label: Two Pointers
nodes.description: Two-pointer technique and sliding window for subarray/subsequence problems

nodes.label: Prefix Sums
nodes.description: 1D and 2D prefix sums for O(1) range sum queries

nodes.label: Custom Sorting & Comparators
nodes.description: Sorting with custom comparators, coordinate compression, event sorting

nodes.label: Depth-First Search
nodes.description: DFS traversal, connected components, cycle detection in undirected graphs

nodes.label: Breadth-First Search
nodes.description: BFS traversal, shortest path in unweighted graphs, multi-source BFS

nodes.label: Flood Fill
nodes.description: Connected component labeling on grids, region counting, boundary tracing

nodes.label: Introduction to Trees
nodes.description: Tree properties, rooting, tree traversal, finding diameter and LCA basics

nodes.label: Greedy with Sorting
nodes.description: Activity selection, interval scheduling, greedy algorithms that rely on sorted order

nodes.label: Stacks & Queues Applications
nodes.description: Monotone stack, next greater element, parenthesis matching, queue-based simulation

nodes.label: Graph Representations
nodes.description: Adjacency list, adjacency matrix, edge list, implicit graphs on grids

nodes.label: Functional Graphs
nodes.description: Successor graphs, cycle detection (Floyd/tortoise-hare), rho shape

nodes.label: Ordered Sets & Maps
nodes.description: Balanced BST sets/maps (std::set, TreeSet), lower/upper bound queries

nodes.label: Introduction to DP
nodes.description: Memoization, coin change, Fibonacci-style recurrence, basic 1D/2D DP

nodes.label: Priority Queues
nodes.description: Binary heap, priority queue operations, using PQ for greedy/simulation

nodes.label: Bipartite Check / Graph Coloring
nodes.description: 2-coloring, bipartiteness testing via BFS/DFS

nodes.label: Knapsack DP
nodes.description: 0/1 knapsack, unbounded knapsack, subset sum variants

nodes.label: Longest Increasing Subsequence
nodes.description: LIS in O(n log n), patience sorting, applications to permutation problems

nodes.label: Interval DP
nodes.description: DP on intervals/ranges, matrix chain multiplication, merging intervals

nodes.label: Tree DP
nodes.description: DP on trees, rerooting technique, subtree aggregation

nodes.label: DP on DAGs
nodes.description: Shortest/longest path on DAGs, counting paths, DP with topological order

nodes.label: Dijkstra's Algorithm
nodes.description: Single-source shortest path on non-negative weighted graphs, priority queue Dijkstra

nodes.label: 0-1 BFS
nodes.description: Shortest path with 0/1 edge weights using deque-based BFS

nodes.label: Bellman-Ford / SPFA
nodes.description: Shortest paths with negative edges, negative cycle detection

nodes.label: Disjoint Set Union (DSU)
nodes.description: Union-Find with path compression and union by rank, connected components dynamically

nodes.label: Minimum Spanning Tree
nodes.description: Kruskal's (DSU-based) and Prim's algorithms, MST properties

nodes.label: Topological Sort
nodes.description: Kahn's algorithm (BFS), DFS-based topological ordering, cycle detection in directed graphs

nodes.label: Strongly Connected Components
nodes.description: Kosaraju's and Tarjan's algorithms, condensation graph

nodes.label: Binary Indexed Tree (Fenwick)
nodes.description: Point update and prefix sum queries in O(log n), inversion counting

nodes.label: Segment Tree (Basic)
nodes.description: Range queries and point updates, range min/max/sum, build in O(n)

nodes.label: Euler Tour Technique
nodes.description: Flattening a tree into an array for subtree and path queries

nodes.label: Lowest Common Ancestor
nodes.description: Binary lifting for LCA, Euler tour + RMQ approach, O(log n) per query

nodes.label: String Hashing
nodes.description: Polynomial rolling hash, Rabin-Karp substring matching, hash collisions

nodes.label: Combinatorics
nodes.description: nCr with modular inverse, inclusion-exclusion, PIE, Catalan numbers

nodes.label: Number Theory (Gold)
nodes.description: Modular arithmetic, Fermat's little theorem, modular inverse, sieve of Eratosthenes

nodes.label: Greedy (Exchange Arguments)
nodes.description: Proving greedy via exchange argument, scheduling, task assignment

nodes.label: Bitmask DP
nodes.description: DP over subsets using bitmasks, Hamiltonian path, TSP-like problems

nodes.label: Sweep Line
nodes.description: Event-based sweep line for interval/rectangle problems, coordinate compression

nodes.label: Segment Tree with Lazy Propagation
nodes.description: Range updates and range queries with lazy propagation, range add/set operations

nodes.label: Persistent Segment Tree
nodes.description: Persistent segment trees for version-based queries, kth element in range

nodes.label: Segment Tree Beats
nodes.description: Range chmin/chmax operations with Ji driver segment tree

nodes.label: Merge Sort Tree
nodes.description: Merge sort tree for offline range order-statistic queries

nodes.label: Heavy-Light Decomposition
nodes.description: HLD for path queries/updates on trees using segment trees

nodes.label: Centroid Decomposition
nodes.description: Centroid decomposition for path distance queries, tree divide-and-conquer

nodes.label: Small-to-Large Merging
nodes.description: DSU on tree (small-to-large merging), merging sets efficiently on trees

nodes.label: Convex Hull Trick
nodes.description: Maintaining upper/lower envelope of lines for DP optimization

nodes.label: Li Chao Tree
nodes.description: Li Chao segment tree for dynamic line insertion and minimum/maximum queries

nodes.label: Divide & Conquer DP
nodes.description: Divide and conquer optimization for DP with monotone minima property

nodes.label: Sum over Subsets (SOS) DP
nodes.description: DP over all subsets of a bitmask, subset convolution, Mobius transform

nodes.label: Advanced DP Techniques
nodes.description: Knuth optimization, aliens trick (lambda optimization), connection profile DP

nodes.label: Maximum Flow
nodes.description: Ford-Fulkerson, Dinic's algorithm, max-flow min-cut theorem

nodes.label: Bipartite Matching
nodes.description: Hungarian algorithm, Hopcroft-Karp, Konig's theorem, minimum vertex cover

nodes.label: Min-Cost Max-Flow
nodes.description: Minimum-cost maximum flow, successive shortest paths algorithm

nodes.label: Suffix Array
nodes.description: O(n log n) suffix array construction, LCP array, substring queries

nodes.label: Aho-Corasick
nodes.description: Multi-pattern string matching automaton, failure links

nodes.label: KMP / Z-Algorithm
nodes.description: Knuth-Morris-Pratt prefix function, Z-function for pattern matching

nodes.label: Convex Hull (Geometry)
nodes.description: Andrew's monotone chain, Graham scan, rotating calipers for farthest pair

nodes.label: Computational Geometry
nodes.description: Line intersection, point-in-polygon, polygon area, half-plane intersection

nodes.label: Sqrt Decomposition
nodes.description: Block decomposition for range queries, sqrt bucketing

nodes.label: Mo's Algorithm
nodes.description: Offline range queries in O(n sqrt(n)), Mo's with updates, Mo's on trees

nodes.label: Offline Query Techniques
nodes.description: CDQ divide and conquer, offline deletion via link-cut or rollback DSU

nodes.label: 2-SAT
nodes.description: Implication graph, solving 2-SAT via SCC, constructing assignments

nodes.label: Matrix Exponentiation
nodes.description: Matrix power for linear recurrences, Cayley-Hamilton speedup

nodes.label: Eulerian Paths & Circuits
nodes.description: Hierholzer's algorithm, conditions for Eulerian path/circuit existence

nodes.label: DSU with Rollback
nodes.description: Offline dynamic connectivity using DSU with undo/rollback operations
